speaker: speaker2
text: Not yet , but I'm thinking of it . Have you bought one , Dad ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I took out a life insurance policy and made your mother the beneficiary .

speaker: speaker2
text: Can you tell me why you want to buy it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I am a fireman and it is a dangerous job . I have to consider your mother's life .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , I see . Do you advise me to buy one ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You have children now . What if something , God forbid , happens to you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: That's true . Well , how much do you think I should get ?

speaker: speaker1
text: A $ 100 000 policy shouldn't be too expensive . Here , call my agent . He'll give you a good deal .
